title: Belmar approves boardwalk resiliency grant
raw_text: Belmar officials said a $4.2 million state resiliency grant was approved to elevate portions of the boardwalk and improve stormwater drainage near Ocean Avenue. The mayor said construction could begin next year if final engineering is completed.
